description_long: This house is situated on a sloped grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a modern gable roof and a combination of light brown and white exterior finishes. Large windows are present on multiple sides, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a small pool or water feature in the backyard, as well as several trees and landscaped areas. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The main entryway is accessible from the driveway and is sheltered by a modest overhang.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped yard on a sloped plot.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, gable roof, and rear yard with pool feature.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard, pool, and the stepped two-story structure.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the driveway, garage, and main entrance with adjacent landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, modest overhang, and direct access from the driveway, no prominent porch or columns.
